items.title: 陈静远
items.content: 个人简介我主要研究 ：1）量子场论的非微扰现象，尤其是以范畴学语言来自然地梳理、解决传统上难以解决的非微扰问题；2）凝聚态理论——既包括形式理论和输运理论的发展，也包括基于具体实验的唯象问题。

extra.name: 陈静远
research_areas: 量子场论的非微扰现象
extra.bio: 个人简介我主要研究 ：1）量子场论的非微扰现象，尤其是以范畴学语言来自然地梳理、解决传统上难以解决的非微扰问题；2）凝聚态理论——既包括形式理论和输运理论的发展，也包括基于具体实验的唯象问题。

education.institution: University of Michigan at Ann Arbor

items.title: 段斯斯
items.content:
Dr. Sisi Duan is a Researcher at theInstitute for Advanced Study, Tsinghua University. She is also affiliated with Zhongguancun Laboratory and State Key Laboratory of Cryptography and Digital Economy Security. 
        She received her Ph.D. in Computer Science from theUniversity of California, Davisin 2014
        (Advisors: Prof. Karl Levitt and Sean Peisert). She got her bachelor's degree in Electrical and Electronic Engineering from theUniversity of Hong Kongin 2010.
        Prior to joining Tsinghua University in 2020, she was an Assistant Professor atthe University of Maryland, Baltimore Countyfrom 2017 to 2020,
        a Weinberg fellow atOak Ridge National Laboratoryfrom 2015 to 2017.
        Dr. Duan's research interests include distributed systems security, blockchain, and applied cryptography.

extra.name: 段斯斯
extra.bio:
